summary: 22/22 new C# tests pass; 2942/2942 total C# pass; mutation tests caught all 4 load-bearing mutations (merge order, orphan exclusion, layer split, planner-set filter). But the 2 architect-spec'd plang drift cases are committed without .pr companions and report [Stale] in plang --test — the load-bearing safeguard never executes. plang build wedges before reaching them on a pre-existing retry-path bug that triggers earlier on this branch (Publish.goal planner returned 10 vs 9 steps).

findings.title: Drift .test.goal files commit without .pr — assertions never run
findings.evidence: plang --test reports: 2 stale; plang build exits 2 on Publish.goal before reaching CompileLlmNotes; same wedge fires on parent path-polymorphism on a different goal (pre-existing) but on this branch the planner emits 10 plans for Publish.goal's 9 steps and triggers retry earlier.
findings.fix: Ship .pr files for both drift cases (built once builder is unwedged, or hand-seeded). Optionally unwedge plang build or document a manual workaround.
